name: Casa Bauducco Paulista
description: Italian-inspired café and bakery offering artisan panettones, coffee, and pastries in the heart of Avenida Paulista.

name: Café Girondino
address: Rua Boa Vista, 365, São Paulo, SP
description: Traditional coffee shop located in the historic center of São Paulo.

name: Famiglia Mancini
description: Traditional Italian restaurant famous for its pasta dishes and classic São Paulo atmosphere.

name: Mercado Municipal de São Paulo
address: Rua da Cantareira, 306, São Paulo, SP
description: Historic public market known for gourmet foods, fresh produce, and the iconic mortadella sandwich.

name: Galeria do Rock
address: Av. São João, 439, São Paulo, SP
description: Iconic shopping center dedicated to music, streetwear, skate culture, and alternative fashion.

name: Japan House São Paulo
description: Japanese cultural center promoting art, technology, gastronomy, and innovation.

name: Instituto Moreira Salles
description: Cultural institute featuring photography, cinema, music, literature, and art exhibitions.
